title: harnessed v5.0 — Workflow State Machine Core (Spec 1: A/B/C/E/F)
summary: Technical spec for harnessed v5.0 state-machine core: structured progress ledger, status --recover, fail-closed evidence guard, and sha256 handoff drift detection.
notes: Manifest-declared SPEC (authoritative). Document self-labels 'DESIGN LOCKED' and contains a locked-decisions table (Q2-Q7) plus eng-review decisions (D1-D3), but the locking authority is delegated to sister ADR-0033/ADR-0029; this artifact is the implementation contract (schemas, CLI surface, component isolation), hence SPEC not ADR. locked=false per rule (only Accepted ADRs are locked).
